cdsiSource: Pneumococcal Risk 6-18 yrs 2-dose PCV-PPSV; Risk 2-5 years 4-dose (PPSV at end)

cases.description: PPSV23 D1 after PCV15 series complete: ≥8w (56d) interval, min age 2y
cases.rationale: CDSI 'Risk 2-5 years 4-dose' D4 (PPSV) prefInt=1825d (5y) — but per ACIP the PCV→PPSV interval is 8w. Code line 207-216 enforces 56d (8w) min interval, matches ACIP.

cases.description: PPSV23 NOT recommended after PCV20 (PCV20 covers PPSV serotypes)
cases.rationale: Code line 209 gates PPSV23 D1 on !usedPCV20. ACIP confirms no PPSV23 follow-up after PCV20.

cases.description: PPSV23 D2 only for asplenia/immunocomp/HIV; ≥5y after D1
cases.rationale: CDSI Risk 6-18 yrs IC PCV-PPSV-PPSV D3 prefInt=1825d (5y). Code line 218-224 sets minInt: 1825.
